channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Aaron Rodgers Signs One-Year Contract to Return to Pittsburgh Steelers
item.description: Aaron Rodgers, the four-time NFL MVP, has agreed to a one-year contract to return to the Pittsburgh Steelers, ending a lengthy decision-making period. At 42 years old, Rodgers led the Steelers to an A...

item.title: Former Trump Border Patrol Official Criticizes DHS and Administration Over Immigration Policy
item.description: Greg Bovino, a former high-ranking Border Patrol official during the Trump administration, publicly criticized his former employers and the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for obstructing strict...

item.title: Air India reduces international flights due to geopolitical tensions and rising costs
item.description: Air India has announced substantial cuts to its international flight operations between June and August, with a 40% reduction in flights to North America and overall international operations down by 2...

item.title: Audi A5 Review: A Glamorous Yet Less Practical Successor to the A4
item.description: Audi’s decision to retire the A4 after decades of popularity has left many loyal buyers feeling a bit short-changed. The new 2026 A5 steps in to fill the gap, but it is a very different beast. Histori...

item.title: Lessons for UDA on Managing Political Alliances and Public Patience
item.description: Governor Irungu Kang’ata of Murang’a County shares insights for UDA on practical politics, emphasising the importance of keeping political coalitions intact rather than purging rivals. He compares pol...

item.title: Bulgaria wins Eurovision 2026 as the UK finishes last
item.description: Bulgaria secured its first-ever Eurovision victory in the 70th anniversary edition, with Dana performing the catchy pop song 'Bangaranga'. Israel's Noam Bettan took second place amid a tense and polit...

item.title: Trump criticises Lauren Boebert for supporting Thomas Massie despite past endorsements
item.description: Former President Donald Trump has publicly criticised Lauren Boebert, a Republican congresswoman from Colorado, after she expressed support for Kentucky Representative Thomas Massie. Massie has recent...

item.title: FIA Promises Thorough Investigation Following Sarafa Bazaar Raid Incident
item.description: KARACHI: The Federal Investigation Agency (FIA) Karachi Zone has promised a thorough and impartial investigation following a controversial raid at Sarafa Bazaar, Saddar, where allegations of violence ...

item.title: Toronto Swatch stores temporarily close due to high demand for new watch release
item.description: On Saturday, two Swatch stores in Toronto were temporarily closed after overwhelming customer demand for the launch of a new watch led to unusually long lines. Fans and shoppers queued for hours outsi...

item.title: Annual La Loma Lechon Festival celebrates culture, community, and cuisine
item.description: The Quezon City government has announced the return of the annual La Loma Lechon Festival today, celebrating the district's reputation as the country’s lechon capital. Coinciding with the feast of Nue...

item.title: A Visual Journey Through London Streets in the 1980s
item.description: During the 1980s, London presented a vivid mix of contrasts, where historic Victorian architecture stood alongside the neon glow of a transforming city. The streets became a canvas for emerging cultur...

item.title: Rivers State Government Plans Industrial Growth Through Private Partnerships
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Sir Siminialayi Fubara don yan say industrialisation na top priority for him government. Him talk say government dey ready to join hand with private sector, especially Shell Gas...

item.title: Kenyan Shilling Holds Ground Against Dollar as Fuel Costs Rise
item.description: During the week between May 7 and May 14, 2026, the Kenyan shilling showed remarkable stability against the US dollar despite global pressures. The Central Bank of Kenya (CBK) reported that, amid risi...

item.title: Experts Warn of Potential Retaliation Following Killing of Senior ISIS Commander
item.description: Na major breakthrough dey for Nigeria counter-terrorism effort as Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, one senior ISIS commander wey dey West Africa and Sahel, don die. Former DSS boss, Mike Ejiofor talk say even tho...

item.title: Msunduzi residents call for concrete action and accountability in city renewal
item.description: Residents and ratepayers of the Msunduzi Municipality have voiced concerns over slow progress and ongoing challenges in urban renewal initiatives in Pietermaritzburg. Speaking after the Pietermaritzbu...

item.title: Quezon City Police Arrest Two High-Risk Criminals in Metro Manila Operations
item.description: The Quezon City Police District (QCPD) successfully apprehended two of Metro Manila’s most wanted individuals during operations on Friday night. A 25-year-old suspect identified only as Marcelito was ...

item.title: Coalition proposes limiting social benefits for non-citizens, emphasizing citizenship commitment
item.description: Angus Taylor, representing the Coalition, has outlined a proposal that links certain social benefits to Australian citizenship. Permanent residents who choose not to become citizens would be excluded ...

item.title: UK Eurovision Spokesperson La Voix Announces Votes in Glittering Gown as UK Finishes Last
item.description: La Voix, the UK’s Eurovision spokesperson, added a touch of glamour to the event by presenting the country's votes in a dazzling, rhinestone-covered gown. The drag artist, known for her sparkling perf...

item.title: A Writer Reflects on Political Divisions in the Literary Community
item.description: Mary Garden shares her personal experience of feeling estranged from the literary world she once considered home. Having long identified as politically progressive and committed to speaking against cr...

item.title: Trump's China Visit Viewed as Strategic Setback, Author Suggests Potential Side Deals
item.description: During President Donald Trump's state visit to China in May 2026, analysts and biographers have noted limited tangible gains for the United States. Author Michael Wolff, speaking on The Daily Beast's ...
